posts.author: gary (Gary Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am getting options for status columns and show them on my app, but problem is the order in which I get these options in setting string is different from actual order on UI?

Is there something I am missing or is this how it is?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @gary, thanks for posting! I would recommend reposting here: FAQs - No-Code (Zapier, Integromat, etc) - monday Community Forum so that we can get a technical specialist to look!
